title: Free Edition
description: Where the world is made out of wool! Build, Explore, and survive
body:
# 
# **Minecraft Free Edition!**

### Where the world is made out of wool! Build, Explore, and survive 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/AA1CNMm5DOc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Changes:

### The title screen:

the title screen is now diffrent from how its used to look with a custom background, title and some custom new splashs that you will love!

![Preview ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c98cb995fff7eacca0ec832bc37bd9bcb7f96bc8.png)

### Every block is now wool 
Every block is now wool from wood to stone to nether to end blocks!! there are so many diffrent varieties of blocks that look the same Here is a preview of the creative inventory:

![Preview of of the creative inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/836e1833d2b59709919189172856c15251f02d5d.png)

### The Sky now is made out of Wool

The sun and the moon and the whole sky is now made out of wool **(requires** [**optifine**](https://optifine.net/downloads) **or** [**fabricskyboxes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) **)**
hmmmm i wonder if im living inside of a box

![sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90586b1631147e5206f2607af880374ec1933874.png)

### The End poem

you need to check it out yourself

## installation ⬇️

### The vanilla launcher

-  **download the pack from this page**                                                                                    
-  **after downloading copy\move the pack from the download folder to C:\Users\USER\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks**                                                         
- **Open your game and head to options\resourcepacks and activate the pack**                                     
- **enjoy <3**

## Most asked questions ❓

- **will you port this resource pack to bedrock?**
- **answer:** probably yes, i will port it to bedrock later there is no given time but i'll let you know when its done
- **Why are the intractive blocks not wool?**
- **answer:** i'll make a v1.1 of the pack later with all of the intractive blocks truned into wool with unique so they don't feel off
- **can i use this pack in one of my videos?**
- **answer:** yes you can absolutely use it and its your chioce to give credit or not but its appreciated
